services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles.
services.notes: Results typically last 3-4 months. Consultation required before first treatment.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Hyaluronic acid fillers for lip enhancement, cheek contouring, and facial volumising.
services.notes: Results typically last 6-18 months depending on area. Consultation required.

services.name: Consultations
services.description: Initial face-to-face assessment with our aesthetic practitioners.
services.notes: Free of charge. Required before any treatment.

booking.notes: Bookings can be made via WhatsApp or through our website.

faqs.question: How much does Botox cost?
faqs.answer: Botox starts from £200 per area. The exact cost depends on the number of areas treated. We recommend a free consultation to discuss your specific needs and get an accurate quote.

faqs.question: Do you offer free consultations?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer free consultations. This is actually required before any treatment. You can book via WhatsApp or our website.

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9am to 7pm. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book via WhatsApp or through our website. We require 24 hours notice for any cancellations.

faqs.question: How much do fillers cost?
faqs.answer: Dermal fillers start from £250 per syringe. The total cost depends on the area being treated and how many syringes are required. A free consultation will give you an accurate personalised quote.
